
### an OOO pipeline diagram 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/oooOverallExec.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooOverallExec.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooOverallExec.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/oooOverallExec.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
